S.FORM: Joel Anthony hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pkaki' kkska'. kawas tay 1982, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 8, Joel Anthony, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *oel antƒßonj ƒßja î…£a nŒ≤a p…£naw î mari î mis~…ïuw qanij, qutux s~…ïa pkaki î kks~…ïka î. kawas~…ï taj ****, rjax s~…ïa taj * nqu taj *, *oel antƒßonj, s~…ïquliq na p îunro. ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Œ≤as~…ïketŒ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ï
